narrative:
03 Ohio Senate district has 238,754 registered voters, with 60.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.2%, a modest Republican lean of 3.1 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean -0.2% D−R vs -8.2% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
